LeaderboardEntry.title: LeaderboardEntry
LeaderboardEntry.description: Represents a record of a successful Minesweeper game clearance.

userId.description: The Firebase Authentication UID of the player.

username.description: The display name of the player.

avatar.description: The selected avatar for the player.

difficulty.description: The difficulty setting of the board.

mines.description: Number of mines present on the board.

streak.description: Jiao win streak achieved during the play.

createdAt.description: The timestamp of when the score was recorded.

leaderboard/{scoreId}.description: Global user high scores for fast board clears.
